---
title: "initial workflow"
output: html_document
date: "2026-03-08"
---
Required libraries
```{r}
library("tidyverse")
library("janitor")
library("naniar")
```



initial data reading and cleaning
```{r}
atlantic_argos <- read_csv("../input_files/AtlanticArgos.csv")

pacific_argos <- read_csv("../input_files/PacificArgos.csv")

pacific_tad <- read_csv("../input_files/Pacific_TAD.csv") %>% 
  clean_names()
```
required libraries
```{r}
library(akima)
library(viridis)
```


```{r}
deepdata <- pacific_tad %>% 
  mutate(
    deep_time = b100 + b150 + b200 + b_200
  )

interp_data <- with(deepdata, interp(x = lon, y = lat, z = deep_time, duplicate = "mean"))

interp_df <- expand.grid(
  lon = interp_data$x,
  lat = interp_data$y
)

interp_df$deep_time <- as.vector(interp_data$z)
ggplot(interp_df, aes(x = lon, y = lat, fill = deep_time)) +
  geom_raster() +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(name = "Proportion Time >100 m",
                       limits = c(0,1),
                       option = "cividis") +
  coord_fixed() +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    x = "Longitude",
    y = "Latitude"
  )
```

```{r}
sst_interp <- with(pacific_tad,
  interp(x = lon, y = lat, z = sst, duplicate = "mean")
)

sst_df <- expand.grid(
  lon = sst_interp$x,
  lat = sst_interp$y
)

sst_df$SST <- as.vector(sst_interp$z)


ggplot(sst_df, aes(lon, lat, fill = SST)) +
  geom_raster() +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(name = "Sea Surface Temp (°C)",
                       option = "magma") +
  coord_fixed() +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    x = "Longitude",
    y = "Latitude"
  )
```
```{r}
do_interp <- with(pacific_tad,
  interp(x = lon, y = lat, z = do_depth, duplicate = "mean")
)

do_df <- expand.grid(
  lon = do_interp$x,
  lat = do_interp$y
)

do_df$DO_depth <- as.vector(do_interp$z)

ggplot(do_df, aes(lon, lat, fill = DO_depth)) +
  geom_raster() +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(name = "Hypoxic Boundary Depth (m)") +
  coord_fixed() +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    x = "Longitude",
    y = "Latitude"
  )
```

trend graphs of dive depth to do depth
```{r}
pacific_tad %>% 
  select(id, do_depth, b_50) %>% 
  ggplot(
    mapping = aes(
      x = do_depth,
      y = b_50)
    )+
    geom_point(
      alpha = 0.5)+
    geom_smooth(
      se = FALSE,
      method = lm
    )+
    theme_classic()+
    labs(
      x = "Dissolved Oxygen",
      y = "Proportion of Time"
    )
```
```{r}
pacific_tad %>% 
  select(id, do_depth, b100) %>% 
  ggplot(
    mapping = aes(
      x = do_depth,
      y = b100)
    )+
    geom_point(
      alpha = 0.5)+
    geom_smooth(
      se = FALSE,
      method = lm
    )+
    theme_classic()+
    labs(
      x = "Dissolved Oxygen",
      y = "Proportion of Time"
    )
```
```{r}
pacific_tad %>% 
  select(id, do_depth, b150) %>% 
  ggplot(
    mapping = aes(
      x = do_depth,
      y = b150)
    )+
    geom_point(
      alpha = 0.5)+
    geom_smooth(
      se = FALSE,
      method = lm
    )+
    theme_classic()+
    labs(
      x = "Dissolved Oxygen",
      y = "Proportion of Time"
    )
```
```{r}
pacific_tad %>% 
  select(id, do_depth, b200) %>% 
  ggplot(
    mapping = aes(
      x = do_depth,
      y = b200)
    )+
    geom_point(
      alpha = 0.5)+
    geom_smooth(
      se = FALSE,
      method = lm
    )+
    theme_classic()+
    labs(
      x = "Dissolved Oxygen",
      y = "Proportion of Time"
    )
```
```{r}
pacific_tad %>% 
  select(id, do_depth, b_200) %>% 
  ggplot(
    mapping = aes(
      x = do_depth,
      y = b_200)
    )+
    geom_point(
      alpha = 0.5)+
    geom_smooth(
      se = FALSE,
      method = lm
    )+
    theme_classic()+
    labs(
      x = "Dissolved Oxygen",
      y = "Proportion of Time"
    )
```

trends of surface temperature to dive depth
```{r}
pacific_tad %>% 
  select(id, sst, b_50) %>% 
  ggplot(
    mapping = aes(
      x = sst,
      y = b_50)
    )+
    geom_point(
      alpha = 0.5)+
    geom_smooth(
      se = FALSE,
      method = lm
    )+
    theme_classic()+
    labs(
      x = "Ocean Surface Temperature",
      y = "Proportion of Time"
    )
```
```{r}
pacific_tad %>% 
  select(id, sst, b100) %>% 
  ggplot(
    mapping = aes(
      x = sst,
      y = b100)
    )+
    geom_point(
      alpha = 0.5)+
    geom_smooth(
      se = FALSE,
      method = lm
    )+
    theme_classic()+
    labs(
      x = "Ocean Surface Temperature",
      y = "Proportion of Time"
    )
```
```{r}
pacific_tad %>% 
  select(id, sst, b150) %>% 
  ggplot(
    mapping = aes(
      x = sst,
      y = b150)
    )+
    geom_point(
      alpha = 0.5)+
    geom_smooth(
      se = FALSE,
      method = lm
    )+
    theme_classic()+
    labs(
      x = "Ocean Surface Temperature",
      y = "Proportion of Time"
    )
```
```{r}
pacific_tad %>% 
  select(id, sst, b200) %>% 
  ggplot(
    mapping = aes(
      x = sst,
      y = b200)
    )+
    geom_point(
      alpha = 0.5)+
    geom_smooth(
      se = FALSE,
      method = lm
    )+
    theme_classic()+
    labs(
      x = "Ocean Surface Temperature",
      y = "Proportion of Time"
    )
```
```{r}
pacific_tad %>% 
  select(id, sst, b_200) %>% 
  ggplot(
    mapping = aes(
      x = sst,
      y = b_200)
    )+
    geom_point(
      alpha = 0.5)+
    geom_smooth(
      se = FALSE,
      method = lm
    )+
    theme_classic()+
    labs(
      x = "Ocean Surface Temperature",
      y = "Proportion of Time"
    )
```

```{r}

```
